name: Crema
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk and 1/2 cup sugar in a medium saucepan; bring to boiling point, stirring occasionally (do not boil).
2. Remove from heat.
3. In a separate mixing bowl, combine the egg yolks and remaining 1/2 cup sugar; gradually add cornstarch, stirring well.
4. Gradually stir half of the hot milk into the egg mixture; then add to the remaining hot milk, stirring constantly.
5. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until smooth and thickened.
6. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Pour the custard into a serving bowl and chill.
8. To serve, top with fresh strawberries.
Yield: 6-8 servings. Note: The recipe may be doubled or tripled if desired.
